title: Support multiple manifests in c/storage
body:
<s>WIP, do not merge: Right now only <s>to have a fallback implementation and</s> to get it through CI.</s>

<s>**The c/image branch is unmerged upstream.**</s>

comments.body: @mtrmac Can fix this PR so we can merge it?
We still don’t have tests for the c/image part, but it’s been merged into CRI-O already and all the buildah/libpod/CRI-O tests are passing, so sure, let’s call this good enough.
